title: [Blue Glacier, Mountain Pass]
description: All the climbing up and down over the icy rocks of this pass has exhausted you -- the bitter cold has taken its toll as well.  The ever-present wind with all its whistling and howling has come close to driving you mad.  What you wouldn't give for a hot bath, a good meal, and a tankard of mulled wine!

wayto.2521: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'northeast'
